headline: Moonshot AI Launches Kimi K2.6: Open-Source Model Outperforms GPT-5.4 and Claude Opus 4.6 on Long-Horizon Coding and Agents
summary: Moonshot AI has released Kimi K2.6 (1T MoE, 32B active) supporting a 262K-token context window and parallel agent swarms of up to 300 sub-agents. It scored 54.0% on Humanity's Last Exam (with tools), 83.2% on BrowseComp, 58.6% on SWE-Bench Pro, and 86.3% on BrowseComp with Agent Swarm. The model is now available on kimi.com, OpenRouter, Hugging Face, and Ollama.
